name: CROWN CASTLE INC.
summary: Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, and leases shared wireless infrastructure in the United States, primarily cell towers. The company provides site rental services to wireless carriers and other tenants, enabling them to deploy and expand their networks. Crown Castle is also in the process of selling its Fiber Business.

products.name: Tower Site Rental
products.description: Leasing of space on cell towers to wireless carriers and other tenants for network deployment.

products.name: Fiber Business
products.description: Fiber infrastructure services, pending sale as of the filing date.

partnerships.description: Agreements with DISH have been terminated, impacting revenues.
Sprint cancellations referenced as impacting site rental revenues.
